parts.text: {"answer":"src/parser/schema.ts trims schema field names after splitting/tokenization because tokenizing first preserves raw delimiter and quoted-field behavior, then per-field trimming only cleans the resulting field names.","evidence":{"session_id":"ses_1e18480c1ffeZEDu5yO3I7TMkc","blob_id":"schema_parser_correction","message_id":"msg_e1e7b7f4e0012he06mt057oKrI"},"rationale":"The correction chain explicitly supersedes the early note to trim the whole schema header before tokenization. The final corrected rationale is to tokenize first, then trim each field; the before-tokenization rationale was wrong and should not be cited as final.","irrelevant_context_ignored":["CSV trim cleanup","Network timeout parser"]}
